'''mapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualmlessly|qualmlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualmlessly|qualmlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mapate|mapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mapatesher|mapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapatesherĂ«m|mapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mapatero|mapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mapateshĂ«|mapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapateshĂ«m|mapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimapatero|gokimapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimapateshĂ«|gokimapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapateshĂ«m|gokimapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomapankerom|gomapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomapankeshĂ«|gomapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomapankeshĂ«m|gomapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomapankeya|gomapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mapaterom|mapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapatemu|mapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mapateya|mapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimapaterom|gokimapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapatemu|gokimapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimapateya|gokimapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mapapate|mapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mapapatesher|mapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapapatesherĂ«m|mapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mapapatero|mapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mapapateshĂ«|mapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapapateshĂ«m|mapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimapapatero|gokimapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimapapateshĂ«|gokimapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapapateshĂ«m|gokimapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomapapankerom|gomapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomapapankeshĂ«|gomapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomapapankeshĂ«m|gomapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomapapankeya|gomapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mapapaterom|mapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mapapatemu|mapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mapapateya|mapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimapapaterom|gokimapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimapapatemu|gokimapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimapapateya|gokimapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠte|mĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠtesher|mĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠtero|mĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠpĂŠtero|gokimĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠterom|mĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠtemu|mĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠpĂŠteya|mĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠpĂŠterom|gokimĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠpĂŠteya|gokimĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafpafte|mafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafpaftesher|mafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafpaftesherĂ«m|mafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafpaftero|mafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafpafteshĂ«|mafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafpafteshĂ«m|mafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafpaftero|gokimafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafpafteshĂ«|gokimafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafpafteshĂ«m|gokimafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafpafnkerom|gomafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafpafnkeshĂ«|gomafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafpafnkeshĂ«m|gomafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafpafnkeya|gomafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafpafterom|mafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafpaftemu|mafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafpafteya|mafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafpafterom|gokimafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafpaftemu|gokimafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafpafteya|gokimafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
